subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, my Hope, and the Pinnacle of my aspirations! I beseech Thee, by Thy grace and mercy, which Thou hast exclusively bestowed upon the choicest among Thy creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و ربی و رجائی و غایه آمالی اسئلک بفضلک و رحمتک التی خصصت بها خیره خلقک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
